tests.scenario: Verify sleep quick start launches content promptly
steps: Launch the application and sign in with a valid user account.
Navigate to the home or sleep entry screen.
Select the Sleep Quick Start action.
Observe content start behavior and prompt flow.
tests.expected_result: Given the user opens the app before bedtime, When the user selects Sleep Quick Start, Then playback shall begin within a short startup time and without unnecessary intermediate prompts.

tests.scenario: Verify sleep filters constrain result set
steps: Launch the application and sign in with a valid user account.
Open sleep browsing and apply narrator, duration, and content-type filters.
Submit filtering options and load results.
Inspect returned items for filter alignment.
tests.expected_result: Given the user applies sleep filters, When filtered results are displayed, Then returned items shall match selected filter values with high relevance.

tests.scenario: Verify short sleep collection lists brief sessions
steps: Launch the application and sign in with a valid user account.
Open the short sleep collection.
Review listed session durations.
Confirm the majority of entries are brief sessions.
tests.expected_result: Given the user opens the short sleep collection, When content is listed, Then most sessions shall fall within short-duration ranges suitable for quick bedtime use.

tests.scenario: Verify mood and time based recommendations
steps: Launch the application and sign in with a valid user account.
Open recommendations and choose a mood and time budget.
Request personalized recommendations.
Inspect recommendation relevance to both inputs.
tests.expected_result: Given the user selects a mood and time budget, When recommendations are generated, Then the system shall present multiple sessions aligned with both inputs.

tests.scenario: Verify saved meditation is available in Favorites
steps: Launch the application and sign in with a valid user account.
Open a meditation session and mark it as favorite.
Navigate to the Favorites section.
Open the saved item and start playback.
tests.expected_result: Given a session is marked as favorite, When the user opens Favorites, Then the saved session shall be visible and directly playable.

tests.scenario: Verify subscription billing details before confirmation
steps: Launch the application and sign in with a valid user account.
Start a subscription or trial flow and proceed to the confirmation stage.
Inspect visible billing details before final confirmation.
Verify presence of price, trial terms, and renewal timing.
tests.expected_result: Given the user reaches subscription confirmation, When billing details are shown, Then price, trial terms, and renewal information shall be clearly visible before final confirmation.

tests.scenario: Verify in-app cancellation flow and confirmation
steps: Launch the application and sign in with a valid user account.
Open subscription settings and initiate cancellation.
Complete all required cancellation actions.
Observe final confirmation message and subscription status.
tests.expected_result: Given the user initiates cancellation, When cancellation is completed, Then the system shall show clear confirmation and updated subscription status.

tests.scenario: Verify billing history entries contain charge details
steps: Launch the application and sign in with a valid user account.
Open the billing history page.
Review at least one recent charge entry.
Verify date, amount, and charge type fields are present.
tests.expected_result: Given the user opens billing history, When entries are displayed, Then each entry shall include enough detail to identify charge origin and timing.

tests.scenario: Verify playback controls update audio behavior
steps: Launch the application and sign in with a valid user account.
Start guided playback content.
Adjust narrator volume, background volume, and speed controls.
Observe whether playback output changes accordingly.
tests.expected_result: Given guided content is playing, When the user adjusts audio controls, Then playback output shall reflect the new settings with minimal delay.

tests.scenario: Verify narrator search opens narrator content page
steps: Launch the application and sign in with a valid user account.
Open search and submit a narrator name query.
Open the narrator-specific result or profile page.
Review listed related sessions in that view.
tests.expected_result: Given the user searches by narrator name, When results are shown, Then the user shall be able to open a narrator page and browse related content in one place.

tests.scenario: Verify core workflows remain stable after update
steps: Launch the application and sign in with a valid user account.
Install or launch the latest application build.
Execute startup, login, search, and playback workflows.
Observe whether any blocking failures occur.
tests.expected_result: Given a new app version is installed, When core workflows are executed, Then startup, login, search, and playback shall complete without blocking failures.

tests.scenario: Verify search relevance and filter refinement behavior
steps: Launch the application and sign in with a valid user account.
Run a keyword search from the main search interface.
Inspect initial relevance of returned results.
Apply category filters and verify refined results update correctly.
tests.expected_result: Given the user submits a keyword query, When search results load, Then results shall be relevant and include category labels and functional filters.
